raw_response:
Crossed Extensor Reflex is not typically categorized among withdrawal reflexes, postural reflexes, sympathetics, nor strictly defined as a monosynaptic reflex. The evidence does not specifically mention any direct association of Crossed Extensor Reflex with the given categories A-D.

This reflects that the crossed extensor reflex more closely aligns with being a polysynaptic reflex rather than fitting neatly into those four described categories.
